description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a deep burgundy neck and a matching closure. The front of the bottle features a large, rectangular label with a vivid illustration of pomegranates, the word 'Nar', and additional text indicating the vintage year 2017. The label is predominantly white with red and green accents, and the pomegranate imagery is detailed and prominent. The bottle has a classic Bordeaux shape, with a long, gently tapering neck and a cylindrical body. The closure appears to be covered by a burgundy foil or capsule, adding a touch of elegance. The back and sides of the bottle are unadorned, with the dark glass providing a sleek, opaque appearance.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a burgundy neck and closure, featuring a detailed pomegranate-themed label on the front. The bottle has a classic Bordeaux shape and a foil-covered top.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at an angle, showing part of the front label with pomegranate imagery and the burgundy neck and closure.
description_view_1: The back of the bottle is visible, showing the plain, dark glass surface with no label or markings.
description_view_2: A side view of the bottle, revealing the transition from the label to the unadorned glass and the full height of the neck.
description_view_3: The front of the bottle is fully visible, displaying the detailed pomegranate label, the word 'Nar', and the vintage year 2017.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, rectangular front label with a detailed illustration of pomegranates, the word 'Nar' in cursive red script, and the year 2017. The label is white with red and green accents, covering most of the front of the bottle.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and straight neck with a slight taper towards the top and a defined shoulder transition.
